description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a light-colored exterior, surrounded by a low fence and lush landscaping featuring palm trees and manicured shrubs. The front facade showcases a prominent entryway with a covered porch, a single-car garage, and large bay windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The house is set back from the street with a paved driveway leading to the garage, and the yard is neatly bordered by a wooden fence. The side and rear views reveal additional windows, a small balcony, and a well-maintained garden area. The roof is primarily flat with subtle overhangs and multiple skylights, contributing to the contemporary architectural style. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large bay windows, a single-car garage, and lush landscaping enclosed by a wooden fence. The design features clean lines, a covered entryway, and abundant greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, single-car garage, bay windows, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the house, flat roof, side windows, and the driveway extending to the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch, additional windows, balcony, and a garden area with more palm trees.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the fence, side windows, and the driveway leading to the garage, with landscaping along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay windows and multiple skylights
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, flanked by bay windows and decorative shrubs
